content.content:
220b87c Fix feed entityId validation, enhance chat agent prompt, and add tool logging
543ab04 Add task and feature support to list_workspace_entities tool
175ff8c Replace detailed entity listings in system prompt with tool-based retrieval
b8ea38b Add inline entity links in chat responses with auto-detection
492e980 Fix missing category field on feature table and GROUP BY parse error
5d5f543 Fix PM agent structured output rejection by Azure/OpenRouter
b819c4c Extract entity references from analytics query results for EntityCard rendering
ceccedd Remap Factuality scorer to pass on superset answers
4f873b4 Harden analytics agent prompt, eval scoring, and SurrealQL guardrails
63255a5 Fix analytics eval seed data to match SCHEMAFULL schema requirements

content.thinking: The changes add Answer and Dismiss actions for questions in the governance feed. Let me stage the files and commit.

content.text: The changes add Answer and Dismiss actions for questions in the governance feed, replacing the broken Resolve/Discuss buttons with working Answer (reuses discuss flow) and Dismiss (new server-side handler).

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Answer and Dismiss actions for questions in governance feed

Replace broken Resolve/Discuss buttons on question feed items with
Answer (reuses existing discuss flow) and Dismiss (new server handler
that sets status to dismissed). Enable actions for extracted questions
in awareness tier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
